ads.author: Berto Moon
ads.title: Bally Night Rider Pinball
ads.description: Bally Night Rider Project? Picked it up a little while ago, started getting parts for it and working on it a little bit. So far I put a new Weebly MPU in it. Worked on the rectifier board a bit, it should be replaced or replace the bridge that is bad (they are the smaller bridges not the normal size ones) we jumped one bridge to the other and got most everything to work for testing. Bought new pop caps, new clear plastic protectors, power supply cap kit, orginal backglass was broken so I got a new translite and glass (glass and translite are to thicker than orginal channels. will need to replace them or get a thinner piece of glass I got 1/4 inch glass) A couple displays where not perfect might be the power supply or connectors also. Moving the displays around got them to work in different locations if I remember correctly. Left flipper coil is burned up, I might have a used one I could toss in. That's where I stopped didn't look at the driver board so test the transistor for it. I put it away for new years and now don't feel like messing with it for a while so checking to see if anyone is interested in it. Lockdown bar is included just wasn't in the Pic. Located in Acworth GA

Also included are a bunch of golden tee 98 and 99 EPROMs. I also have these boards if interested: US Classic - not working Outrun - not working Hyper Pacman - recapped and new sound chips but has graphics issue Super Pacman - for parts Super Pacman - powers on but needs two replacement CPU chips to get fully working Top Racer - pole position bootleg, untested, and probably doesn’t work Hard Yardage - Works but tends to reset/ no boot if it doesn’t get exactly 5v Also have a bunch of marquees listed

ads.author: Dirk Smith Johnson
ads.title: Rare Williams OXO Pinball Machine
ads.description: Very rare Williams OXO pinball machine. Previously featured at the Roanoke Pinball Museum in Virginia. This is a unique electro-mechanical game that plays tic-tac-toe! This game has been in fully working condition until recently when it started blowing a fuse during game restart. It's most likely a switch contact somewhere that's broken, but I've been too busy to diagnose it, and I need the room, so I'm willing to sell it for less than I paid to someone who wants a unique game, and is willing to tinker with it. This game is basically in original condition except for being upgraded with $200+ worth of LEDs to make it brighter and more reliable.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: P.O.W. Prisoners of War, Upright Arcade, SNK 1988
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – P.O.W. Prisoners of War (SNK, 1988) Price: $325 Own a piece of late-80s arcade history! This is an original P.O.W. – Prisoners of War upright cabinet from SNK, released in 1988. Known as a classic scrolling fighter / beat ’em up, players battle their way through enemy compounds after escaping captivity. It’s a gritty, action-packed title that helped define the genre and remains a nostalgic favorite for collectors. Condition: - Cabinet is very old and needs a lot of love. - Boards need work and likely new caps. - Monitor powers on but the image quality is poor. - Lights come on. - No sound currently. - This is a project cabinet — ideal for restoration enthusiasts. Highlights: - Rare SNK beat ’em up from the golden age of arcades. - Upright cabinet with authentic late-80s design. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Sold as-is. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Allen Robinson
ads.title: Police Trainer, Upright Arcade, P&P Marketing 1996
ads.description: Vintage Upright Arcade – Police Trainer (P&P Marketing, 1996) Price: $425 (Negotiable, but not by much) Test your reflexes and accuracy with this original Police Trainer upright arcade cabinet from 1996. Developed by P&P Marketing, Police Trainer is a fast-paced shooter that puts players through a series of training exercises — from target practice to reaction drills — making it one of the most unique skill-based arcade shooters of the 90s. Condition: - Cabinet is original but needs some love due to age. - Monitor powers on, image is good, but likely needs new caps for long-term reliability. - Lights and sound both work. - Controls function, but the guns need recalibration. - Sold as-is. Highlights: - Classic 90s shooter with training-style gameplay. - Upright cabinet design with dual light guns. - Fully playable — monitor, lights, and sound all working. - Great candidate for restoration or display in a retro collection. Important: - Price is $425, negotiable but only slightly. - Serious buyers only. No I don’t deliver but it can be picked up or shipped (arranged by buyer) in Powder Springs, GA.

ads.author: Barbara Smith
ads.title: Rare Galaxian Arcade Game
ads.description: Here we have an all original only one to be known to exist Galaxian arcade game made by Dale industries back in the 80's. Serial number 1001, we believe this is the very first one ever created. It made it into the states across the Canadian Border at some point and was found in a storage unit from a collection in Idaho believed to be part of the Grinkers Arcade collection. Everything in this game is all original and working. It is running a midway Galaxian board because it is less glitchy and more reliable. We will include the original working board set which is a bootleg type board for nostalgia's sake to keep it all real. What you see in the video is the game running the original bootleg type board not the Midway version board. This game in this cabinet is extremely rare. We have not seen another one like it.

ads.author: Anthony M. Scaraggi
ads.title: Valley Cougar 8 electronic dartboard, a commercial-grade arcade-style machine
ads.description: This is a Valley Cougar 8 electronic dartboard, a commercial-grade arcade-style machine designed for heavy use. Key features include: Electronic Scoring: Supports multiple games and players, with automatic score adjustment based on player skill levels. P Game Modes: Features various game modes, including a "Split Score" mode where hitting a target increases the score, while missing halves it. Coin-op or Free Play: Can be set up for coin-operated use or free play, making it suitable for both commercial and home environments. Commercial-Grade Build: Designed for durability and heavy use in arcade settings or similar venues.

ads.author: Jackie Neubauer
ads.title: (PENDING) Atari Dig Dug Arcade Machine
ads.description: Selling a really nice fully working original condition Atari dig dug arcade machine. Outside of a few areas of wear on the control panel and the coin door, this is one of the cleanest I've come across in original condition. I just rebuilt the AR board and recapped the monitor as well. Any *reasonable* offer will be considered.

ads.author: Robert Long
ads.title: Lethal enforcers 2 arcade cabinet
ads.description: This is for a lethal enforcers part 2, gunfighters arcade machine. It works, pretty much fine. The monitor has some issues. It needs to be recapped. But it plays just fine. The player two gun I can't get to connect. But I think it's because it's missing the optical lens on it. Not sure how it came out. But it was missing, when I got the machine. The game will let you play all the way through, just fine. But the screen has what they call monitor fog appearing on one side. The coin mechs work fine. Everything is all there. It has a brand new power supply, put in it.

ads.author: Barbara Smith
ads.title: Mad Planets Red Box Spinner (Repro)
ads.description: Here we have a Mad Planets Red Box Spinner. This is a very well done reproduction that was a limited run. Works just as good as the originals.

ads.author: Mandy Mosses
ads.title: Golden Tee 2005 Arcade
ads.description: Powers On, No Video Input Smoke free home. Cabinet is in great shape. The machine powers on and lights up, but the monitor shows “No Video Input.” I don’t know what’s wrong with it, so selling AS-IS. Good project for someone who repairs arcade machines. All parts appear intact. Price: $500 OBO. Willing to trade Pickup only. Will help load.
